description_long: This is a compact, single-story brick bungalow with a gable roof covered in dark, weathered shingles. The front facade features two symmetrically placed windows with white frames and a central door accessed by a small set of concrete steps with metal railings. The brickwork is uniform and dark red-brown, with a stone foundation visible at the base. A single chimney rises from the left side of the roof, and the rear and side elevations each have a single window, with the rear window positioned beneath the roof peak. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on symmetry and practicality.
description: A small, brick, single-story bungalow with a gable roof, symmetrical front windows, and a central door accessed by steps. The structure features a chimney and minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing two symmetrical windows, a central door with steps and railings, and the chimney on the left side of the roof.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the gable end, a single window beneath the roof peak, and the steps and railings leading to the front door.
description_view_2: Rear view with two windows and the chimney visible on the right side of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end and a single window beneath the roof peak, without the entry steps.
